Fear and Greed is at
37
(Fear)
and BTC is at
$65K
this morning. Bitcoin slipped slightly overnight, giving back
gains from earlier in the week as selling pressure returned near
$66K and volume stayed thin heading into the weekend.

One of crypto's founding venues just announced it is closing for
good. A token that helped define on-chain derivatives lost 90% of
its value overnight. And BlackRock, Coinbase, and Strategy just
joined forces to protect Bitcoin from a threat that does not yet
exist.

Let's dive in.

Latest News
-----------

BlackRock, Coinbase and Strategy Just Backed Bitcoin Security
Research

Nine firms including BlackRock, Coinbase, Strategy, ARK
Invest, and Fidelity launched the Bitcoin Security Consortium on
July 23, committing $15 million over three years to fund research
against future quantum computing threats.

Each firm distributes its own share independently. The
consortium has pledged to stay neutral on Bitcoin's code and not
act as a spokesperson for its developers.

What percentage of Bitcoin could be sitting in
quantum-vulnerable addresses?

Read More  
( https://link.coinmarketcap.com/f/a/0Zi7Pn8Gf9Bzoxbh-MTAvA~~/AAQRxRA~/7i9RpfSBqHGUg3uUQ-4EX-WQnORKWpoTmT0P_GQUnj9PLkxqjuyZ-LLkHsF9Ycc6071MY2jC9H-vnMJ1AMhLaiwv1pKkq-HjHJ1qGcenKNoeFNUCDBuZO8ENV4tQGqP2LmQeYy5adTvatFkg-8DZKbkBI-J1KgHvjzRL_vzBiuJqiEmXm54JCtubeHn5EIKuB56OBwYzI265TR8Vi8iGxZ11vhx47EBPw_jNK9KZ0nv6

76430.subject: Aave V4 Arrives on Avalanche: A New Chapter for Onchain Lending
76430.body:
View this post on the web at https://www.team1.blog/p/aave-v4-arrives-on-avalanche-a-new

On July 15, 2026, Aave [ https://substack.com/redirect/13c3a62d-d723-4e33-82c3-9f0506f5a287?j=eyJ1IjoiMXN4Zm00In0.wehL2Vke0PUDz1PHD6ZKtcy1ufIoeqpblecCEEWPpqI ] rolled out its V4 lending protocol on Avalanche, marking the first deployment of its redesigned architecture outside Ethereum. The move follows V4вАЩs Ethereum debut in March and signals AaveвАЩs plan to expand chain by chain, tailoring each deployment to ecosystems where it already has traction rather than replicating the same setup everywhere.
For Avalanche, being chosen as the first expansion beyond Ethereum reflects the networkвАЩs combination of an established Aave lending market and a fast-growing ecosystem for tokenized real-world assets such as Treasuries and corporate bonds.
Want to keep up with the latest in the Avalanche ecosystem? Subscribe to the Team1 blog and get our updates in your inbox weekly.
What Is Aave?
Aave is one of the largest decentralized lending platforms in crypto. Unlike a bank, it isnвАЩt run by a company holding your money and approving loans behind closed doors. It runs on smart contracts, self-executing code on a blockchain, that let people lend crypto to earn interest or borrow against crypto they own, without a middleman.
Aave has facilitated more than $1 trillion in cumulative loan volume since launching, making it one of the most established lending protocols in decentralized finance.
From Monolithic Pools to Hub and Spoke
The biggest change in V4 is architectural.
Previous versions relied on a single shared pool of funds per network. That was efficient, but it also concentrated risk: a problem with one asset could affect the whole pool.
V4 introduces a Hub and Spoke model. The Hub works like a central vault, holding reserves and managing liquidity across the network. Spokes work like individual branches, each with its own collateral rules, risk settings, and liquidation parameters, while drawing on liquidity from the Hub through controlled credit lines.
Different markets can share liquidity while the impact of problems in any single Spoke stays contained. That structure supports ordinary crypto lending, liquid staking, stablecoin markets, and eventually tokenized real-world assets, all on the same underlying capital.
Why Avalanche?
Aave first launched on Avalanche in 2021 via V2 during the Avalanche Rush incentive program, before Avalanche became one of the early networks to support Aave V3 in 2022. Since then, Aave has processed more than $15 billion in all-time cumulative inflows across V2 and V3 deployments on Avalanche [ https://substack.com/redirect/8e11ac4c-c9a6-4209-8b4f-02d2537eb678?j=eyJ1IjoiMXN4Zm00In0.wehL2Vke0PUDz1PHD6ZKtcy1ufIoeqpblecCEEWPpqI ]. Today, the V3 market supports 18 assets, with stablecoin utilization running above 90%.
That track record made Avalanche a natural candidate for V4вАЩs debut beyond Ethereum. Avalanche has also spent the

76429.subject: The Most Leveraged Market on Record
76429.body:
Adrian's DeFi Insights 

–Р–≤—В–Њ—А: Adrian Pape


–Р–≤—В–Њ—А: Adrian Pape

    
    
    –Я—А–Њ—З–Є—В–∞–є—В–µ —Ж—О —Б—В–∞—В—В—О –љ–∞ LinkedIn, —Й–Њ–± –њ—А–Є—Ф–і–љ–∞—В–Є—Б—П –і–Њ –Њ–±–≥–Њ–≤–Њ—А–µ–љ–љ—П
–Я—А–Њ—З–Є—В–∞—В–Є –љ–∞ LinkedIn
https://www.linkedin.com/comm/pulse/most-leveraged-market-record-adrian-pape-nqwue?lipi=urn%3Ali%3Apage%3Aemail_email_series_follow_newsletter_02%3BsiyvPQdOQnqkLySlmax%2FQw%3D%3D&midToken=AQFTjFOONAfT2w&midSig=2xZkLdBbmpWYk1&trk=eml-email_series_follow_newsletter_02-null-0-read_more_banner_cta_&trkEmail=eml-email_series_follow_newsletter_02-null-0-read_more_banner_cta_-null-fz96fz~mryrsohb~i3-null-null&eid=fz96fz-mryrsohb-i3
  
Hey, it's Adrian Oil is back above $90, Iran is still escalating, and the Strait of Hormus is effectively shut again. A few months ago that mix would have sent every market into the deep red. This week the Dow was sent to a short rally literally after Trump threatened to bomb Iran again. Markets get bored of repetitive news, and this news has become very repetitive. But boredom is not the same as safety. We are sitting on the most leveraged US stock market on record, the narrowest rally in years, and a Bitcoin cycle that either follows the 4 year cycle or does whatever it wants. The classic capitulation everyone waited for did not show so far. Neither did the classic euphoria. LetвАЩs get into the broader picture and how to set up for the coming week: Market Overview Start with energy, because everything else hangs off it. Oil pushed back above $90 as the Iran conflict escalated, with Iran striking BahrainвАЩs datacenters and the Houthis warning Saudi Arabia theyвАЩll make shipping harder. The quick de-escalation that was priced in, ships flowing through Hormus again, just didnвАЩt happen. HereвАЩs why thatвАЩs a problem: Higher oil feeds straight into inflation expectations. The market has now started pricing rate hikes, not cuts, with a first one expected around September and a second in Dezember. Those odds move with every PCE print and every dollar on the oil price. For Europe, and Germany especially, pricier energy heading into winter reserve season is its own problem. Now look at equities. The rally was carried by a handful of mega-cap tech and AI stocks while most of the market went nowhere or bled. And the smart money is stepping back. US hedge funds sold equities at the fastest pace since 2017, even faster than the mid-2024 washout, mostly de-risking tech and AI after a strong run. Several chipmakers are already down 30% to 40% from their highs. The move is amplified by how much of this exposure was built with leverage, including leveraged ETFs. When price drops, forced selling feeds on itself. Korea is already seeing forced liquidations spike. ThatвАЩs what a leveraged market looks like when confidence starts to crack. And you can see that clearly in one macro chart: вЖТ Margin debt (money investors borrow against their portfolios to buy more stock) has hit a record high relative to US GDP. After past extremes like this, the S&P 500 lost roughly 11% on

76428.subject: вЪФпЄП Kimi vs the US Treasury
76428.body:
----------
######                  [Collaborate with us](https://utm.genai.works/r/he2t9cz)


--------------------
View image: (https://media.beehiiv.com/cdn-cgi/image/fit=scale-down,format=auto,onerror=redirect,quality=80/uploads/asset/file/8776fa6e-e2d0-4aec-9648-1bed6de3a659/GenAI_Daily_Banner.jpg?t=1778687445)
Caption: 


----------

----------
**Welcome back!** The White House accused China's Moonshot of stealing Anthropic's Fable to build Kimi K3 and floated sanctions, the whole industry thinks Claude Opus 5 ships today, OpenAI is teasing a drop everyone's calling GPT-6 and Google grew revenue 24% while burning $5.9 billion in cash on AI.



**In today's Generative AI Newsletter:**

* **Moonshot:** Did China really steal Claude?

* **Anthropic:** Is Claude Opus 5 dropping today?

* **OpenAI:** What is GPT-6 rumored to do?

* **Google:** How did record revenue still spook Wall Street?


----------

----------
## [The US says China stole Claude to build Kimi](https://techcrunch.com/2026/07/22/treasury-threatens-sanctions-after-white-house-claims-moonshot-distilled-anthropics-fable/)

View image: (https://media.beehiiv.com/cdn-cgi/image/fit=scale-down,format=auto,onerror=redirect,quality=80/uploads/asset/file/24d85486-b5c6-45ca-be19-2cf114057f2e/Beehiiv_01_-_Jul_24.png?t=1784884008)
Caption: 

The White House accused a Chinese lab of stealing Anthropic's best model, and Treasury is dangling sanctions over it.

On Tuesday the White House science chief, Michael Kratsios, said Moonshot ran a large-scale distillation attack on Anthropic's Fable to build Kimi K3, the open model that sold out this month.

Distillation means training your model on another model's answers. It's common and often legal. Doing it at industrial scale on a rival's crown jewel is the part Washington is calling theft.

Treasury's Scott Bessent said open source is not open season on American IP, and put sanctions and a spot on the trade blacklist on the table.

The timeline doesn't add up. Fable only went public on July 1 and Kimi K3 shipped on the 15th.

Researchers say two weeks is nowhere near enough to copy a frontier model and then beat it, which K3 does on some coding tests.

Either Moonshot is faster than America wants to admit, or the case is thinner than the threat.


----------

----------
## [Learn the language every AI is built on](https://utm.genai.works/r/w5jfa25)

View image: (https://media.beehiiv.com/cdn-cgi/image/fit=scale-down,format=auto,onerror=redirect,quality=80/uploads/asset/file/39e0c675-d9f2-49f7-9df9-4b26f81c50ca/16.png?t=1784885606)
Follow image link: (https://academy.genai.works/courses/python-programming-mastery/details?utm_source=beehiiv&utm_medium=newsletter&utm_campaign=academy_promotion_2026&utm_content=beehiiv_newsletter_python_jul&utm_term=w5jfa25)
Caption: 

Python runs the AI tools you use every day. If you want to build with AI instead of only using it, this is where you start.
